description: Flutter/Dart projects (detected via pubspec.yaml). No Dart/Flutter plugin exists in the official Claude Code marketplace - the real tooling here is an MCP server and a couple of skill-based recommendations, documented below rather than declared as installable plugins.
_notes: Not a Claude Code plugin, but relevant: Dart & Flutter MCP Server (docs.flutter.dev/ai/mcp-server) - official Google/Dart-team tool: analyze/fix errors, hot-reload, pub.dev search, run tests. Requires Dart SDK 3.9+ / Flutter 3.35+. Free, open source.

Not a Claude Code plugin, but relevant: Very Good Ventures' AI Flutter plugin (github.com/VeryGoodOpenSource/vgv-ai-flutter-plugin) - best-practice skills (architecture, testing, anti-patterns), company-backed, actively maintained, free.

ios/Runner (native iOS wrapper) and android/app (native Android wrapper) subfolders are covered by swift.json/android.json rules respectively when Claude is working inside them - see rules/dart.flutter.md.
